title: Slovakian Biryani
description: A hearty, flavorful dish that combines the rich traditions of Slovakian cuisine with the aromatic spices of Indian biryani.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Add garlic, ginger, cumin, and coriander; cook for 1 minute.
Add the slovakian and fluffy rice; stir to coat with oil and spices.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Turn off heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
